SEARCH
Package com.example.lottery.model

Class EntrantEvent

java.lang.Object
com.example.lottery.model.EntrantEvent
public class EntrantEvent extends Object
Model class representing the relationship between an entrant and an event. Stores the status of the entrant in the event (e.g., waitlisted, invited).

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    EntrantEvent.Status
    Enum representing the possible statuses of an entrant for an event.
